scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/index.html && npm --prefix btg-ehr install && npm --prefix btg-ehr run build -- --base=/btg-ehr/ && cp -R btg-ehr/dist dist/btg-ehr && npm --prefix PAWS install && npm --prefix PAWS run build -- --base=/PAWS/ && cp -R PAWS/dist dist/PAWS
